objective: Materialize contract-first first-slice specifications and align the Kotlin backend persistence skeleton to those contracts without widening scope.
blocking_rule: If any required input or contract field is ambiguous, stop and write BLOCKED instead of guessing.
in_scope: Create concrete OpenAPI and JSON Schema files under packages/contracts for workspace, git workspace, factory spec, factory run, and factory artifact.
Replace backend fixture responses with contract-aligned controller, service, repository, and Flyway persistence skeletons.
Record this sprint in harness artifacts and pass the local harness gates.
out_of_scope: Frontend implementation for Factory App or Artifact Viewer UI.
Auth, search, realtime, or storage engine selection beyond current contract placeholders.
Running planner, generator, or evaluator inside the product request path.

acceptance_criteria.statement: packages/contracts contains concrete OpenAPI and JSON Schema files for workspace, git workspace, factory spec, factory run, and factory artifact.
Backend exposes first-slice endpoints through contract-aligned controllers backed by service and R2DBC repository skeletons.
Flyway includes first-slice persistence tables and apps/backend/gradlew.bat test completes successfully.
Harness run artifacts for this sprint are complete enough to pass local gate validation.

evaluator_checks: Changed files stayed within touched paths.
Every acceptance criterion has concrete evidence.
